name: Sterile Gloves
description: Simulated sterile gloves for field preparation.
primary_use: Hand protection and sterile technique practice.

name: Gauze Pads
primary_use: Dabbing and clearing the simulated training area.

name: Antiseptic Applicator
description: Simulated antiseptic applicator for cleansing practice.
primary_use: Cleansing the synthetic training patch in outward spirals.

name: Sterile Drape
description: Simulated fenestrated drape for field isolation.

name: Needle Holder
description: Simulated ratcheted instrument that grips the curved needle.
primary_use: Driving the simulated curved needle along its arc.
common_mistakes: Gripping the needle at its tip

parts.label: Grip
parts.description: Ring handles where fingers are placed.

parts.label: Joint
parts.description: The box-lock pivot of the simulated instrument.

parts.label: Jaw
parts.description: Textured surfaces that hold the simulated needle.

parts.label: Tip
parts.description: The active gripping end of the simulated instrument.

name: Tissue Forceps
description: Simulated toothed forceps for stabilizing tissue edges.
primary_use: Supporting the simulated tissue edge during needle passage.
common_mistakes: Crushing grip on the simulated tissue

parts.label: Tip
parts.description: Fine toothed tip for simulated tissue handling.

name: Curved Needle
primary_use: Passing simulated suture material through the training patch.

parts.label: Body
parts.description: The curved body gripped by the needle holder.

parts.label: Point
parts.description: The simulated entry point of the needle.

name: Suture Material
description: Simulated suture thread attached to the curved needle.
primary_use: Simulated wound approximation and knot practice.

parts.label: Grip
parts.description: Ring handles for thumb and ring finger.

parts.label: Tip
parts.description: Blade tips used to cut the simulated suture.

name: Training Scalpel
description: Blunt simulated scalpel for path-tracing exercises.
primary_use: Tracing marked paths on the training board.

name: Left Grasper
common_mistakes: Transferring too close to the board
